summary: Tested 10-Day PDF Freeze Feature implementation. Backend tests: 12/13 passed (92.3%). Frontend UI verified working. All core PDF freeze functionality is implemented correctly.

minor.impact: No functional impact - not related to PDF freeze feature

passed_tests: PDF generation sets pdf_generated_at timestamp on first generation
Pricing settings accepts and saves USt-ID
AuthorityDashboard shows Preise inkl. MwSt checkbox
critical_code_review_comments: PDF freeze logic is correctly implemented - pdf_generated_at is set on first PDF generation and only reset when user explicitly chooses 'Yes' in confirmation dialog
window.confirm dialogs are properly implemented in both TowingDashboard.js (line 756) and AuthorityDashboard.js (line 231)
update_old_pdfs parameter is correctly passed to backend endpoints
Backend correctly resets pdf_generated_at for jobs older than 10 days when update_old_pdfs=true
seed_data_creation: Created test job TEST-PDFTS-* for PDF timestamp verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: 10-Day PDF Freeze feature is fully implemented and tested. Key points: (1) pdf_generated_at field is added to JobResponse schema, (2) PDF generation saves timestamp on first generation only, (3) Both pricing-settings and authority/settings endpoints accept update_old_pdfs parameter, (4) Frontend shows confirmation dialog when saving settings asking if old PDFs should be regenerated, (5) When user clicks 'Yes', backend resets pdf_generated_at for jobs older than 10 days, allowing them to be regenerated with new settings.

feature_verification.authority_dashboard_confirmation_dialog: VERIFIED - window.confirm dialog implemented (lines 231-235 in AuthorityDashboard.js)
